Why make a movie of this scale and not commit to making a part 2? If the revenue meet their expectations then most likely another 2 years before part 2 is released. Not a good move and too long in between. I would prefer 1 four hour movie instead!

If you survive the first 30 minutes of grandiloquent dialogues, you'll get to watch a good movie with a lot of great FX and action sequences.It's called "Dune: Part One" and it seems there will be a trilogy.

It was more like an first episode of an tv show than an full movie. So, It's hard to judge based on this. Like the header says not much has happened, we haven't seen any tangible character development. And there was few scenes that I didn't liked but overall it was a good experience.
